req.title: Card PIN change (idempotency variant)
req.statement: A customer shall change their card PIN at most 5 times per 24-hour window. The operation must be idempotent: duplicate submission with the same Idempotency-Key must return the original result.

doc.reasoning: The requirement has two distinct concerns: (1) a rate limit of 5 PIN changes per 24-hour window, and (2) idempotency via Idempotency-Key. Tests are designed using EP (valid single change), BVA (exactly 5th change succeeds, 6th fails), NEG (duplicate key returns cached result, and exceeding limit returns 429), and STC (state transitions: fresh -> 1 change -> ... -> 5 changes -> blocked). The 40-line limit per executable is respected by delegating setup to fixtures and helpers.

tests.name: test_pin_change_single_valid_request
preconditions: Authenticated customer with a valid card ID
Zero PIN changes made in the current 24-hour window
actions: PATCH /cards/{id}/pin with a valid new PIN and a unique Idempotency-Key
Capture HTTP response status and body
expected: Response body indicates PIN updated successfully

tests.name: test_pin_change_idempotent_duplicate_key_returns_original_result
preconditions: Authenticated customer with a valid card ID
Zero PIN changes made in the current 24-hour window
Same Idempotency-Key to be used twice
actions: PATCH /cards/{id}/pin with a valid new PIN and Idempotency-Key X (first submission)
PATCH /cards/{id}/pin with the same Idempotency-Key X (duplicate submission)
expected: Both responses are identical (status code and body)
PIN change counter increments by 1, not 2
trace: R-FIN-097: duplicate submission with same Idempotency-Key must return original result

tests.name: test_pin_change_fifth_attempt_succeeds
preconditions: Authenticated customer with a valid card ID
Exactly 4 PIN changes already made in the current 24-hour window
actions: PATCH /cards/{id}/pin with a valid new PIN and a unique Idempotency-Key (5th attempt)
expected: HTTP 200 or 204 — the 5th change (upper boundary) is permitted
trace: R-FIN-097: at most 5 times per 24-hour window (upper boundary — inclusive)

tests.name: test_pin_change_sixth_attempt_returns_429
preconditions: Authenticated customer with a valid card ID
Exactly 5 PIN changes already made in the current 24-hour window
actions: PATCH /cards/{id}/pin with a valid new PIN and a unique Idempotency-Key (6th attempt)
expected: Response body contains rate-limit error details
trace: R-FIN-097: at most 5 times per 24-hour window (exceeding upper boundary)

tests.name: test_pin_change_unauthenticated_request_rejected
expected: Rate limit counter is not incremented
trace: R-FIN-097: card belongs to caller (precondition — violated)

tests.name: test_pin_change_state_transitions_fresh_to_rate_limited
preconditions: Authenticated customer with a valid card ID
Zero PIN changes made in the current 24-hour window (fresh state)
actions: Send 5 successive PATCH /cards/{id}/pin requests each with a unique Idempotency-Key
Send a 6th PATCH /cards/{id}/pin request with a new unique Idempotency-Key
expected: Requests 1-5 each return 200 or 204 (state: allowed -> allowed -> ... -> limit reached)
trace: R-FIN-097: at most 5 times per 24-hour window
STC: covers full state chain fresh->1->2->3->4->5->blocked
